title: Proof-or-Stop: Don't Trust the Agent, Trust the Evidence -- Loop Engineering for Verifiable Evidence-Gated Lifecycle Control

charter_objectives: B. Develop a general theory and methodology of expertise-to-evaluation
purpose.artifact: Immutable paper PDF, full-text extraction, TeX source archive, canonical metadata, and acquisition-time evidence about the author-advertised implementation endpoint.
purpose.uncertainty: Whether the paper's lifecycle-gating claims are backed by inspectable implementation, preregistration, experiment records, fixtures, and self-application evidence.
purpose.useful_completion: A later reviewer can read immutable v1 locally and can distinguish paper evidence from release artifacts that were or were not publicly available at acquisition time.

artifacts.role: immutable arXiv v1 gzip-compressed TeX source archive

verification.text_inspection: Inspected opening title/abstract, appendix protocol and paired-status tables, reproducibility section, implementation paths, and final appendix pages; extraction reaches PDF page 48.
verification.source_archive_inspection: Archive lists 00README.json, main.tex, refs.bib, and seven PDF figures; 00README specifies main.tex with pdflatex. It does not contain the advertised implementation or named JSONL/CSV experiment records.
verification.withdrawal_check: The arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

release_status.advertised_claim: The paper's Reproducibility section directs readers to https://github.com/Proof-or-Stop and says to use an implementation repository arxiv-v1 tag or release-notes commit.
release_status.observed: The GitHub organization endpoint returned HTTP 200 and its API reported public_repos=0. The public repositories API returned an empty JSON array. No implementation repository, arxiv-v1 tag, preregistration, 9,240-cell records, mechanism-test fixtures, self-application corpus, or cross-vendor exhibit was publicly enumerable from the advertised endpoint at acquisition time.
release_status.claim_boundary: This is acquisition-time availability evidence, not proof that artifacts never existed or could not later be released. No implementation or quantitative paper claim was audited in this source-acquisition run.
